title: The AI Coding Revolution: Is Traditional Programming Dead?
author: Peter Njuguna
text:
Member-only story
The AI Coding Revolution: Is Traditional Programming Dead?
I spent three months building production apps without writing a single line of code from scratch. Here’s what changed.
The Morning Everything Shifted
It was 6:47 AM on a Tuesday when I realised programming might be dying.
I asked an AI to “build a real-time chat app with authentication, encryption, and a React frontend.” Twenty minutes later, I had a fully functional application. No Stack Overflow. No debugging marathons. No all-nighters.
Just… working code.
We’re not just getting better tools. We’re experiencing a fundamental shift in how software gets built. And if you’re still coding the old way, you might already be behind.
The Game-Changing AI Coding IDEs
Let me cut through the hype and show you the tools actually changing development right now.
Google Antigravity: The New Heavyweight
Google dropped Antigravity in November 2025 alongside Gemini 3, and it’s rewriting the rules.
What Makes It Different:
- Agent-first architecture. Not just autocomplete, autonomous agents that plan, execute, and verify entire workflows across…
